content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be redesigned to treat each individual agent within a multi-agent ecosystem as a stored 'episodic memory entry' rather than a discrete independent actor. This lets the top-level active learning agent dynamically query, retrieve, and fine-tune interaction with sub-agents only when they provide high-information uncertainty reduction, aligning curiosity-driven exploration with efficient memory use.
